My first post on this new Jekyll thing!

07 Sep 2013

Hello! My name is Farhan Sareshwala, a student at UC Davis. I am currently trying out this new web design thing called Jekyll that seems really handy! Here is me attempting a code snippet:

#include <stdio.h>

int main(int argc, char * argv)
{
  printf("Hello world!\n");
}//prints out "Hello world!"

Check out Birds With Arms, my good friend Bryan's favorite subreddit. It is quite silly, and I need to remember to check out Made Me Smile.

Now, here is a picture of my cat, Pepper:
